title: DanoSongs | Royalty Free Music & Songs
desc: Home page of DanoSongs | Royalty Free Music & Songs, a composer artist from New York. Royalty free music and songs by Dan-O for videos, films, apps, games, presentations, podcasts and other media.
text:
DANOSONGS ROYALTY FREE MUSIC
HOME
FAQs
LICENSES
CONTACT
Hi, I'm Dan-O from New York. This is my royalty free music site for videos, films, apps, games, presentations, podcasts and other media. You can stream my music at these links to Spotify,  iTunes, YouTube and Amazon.
Requests for video shout outs, lessons, music promos, covers, brand collabs: bount.com/danoakon
Non-Commercial - Non-profits, schools, students and personal projects can use the music on this site at no cost when crediting "Music by DanoSongs". Click FREE to download and try in your project. I appreciate tips when you use the music - click here to tip me  or Venmo @danosongs
Commercial - I recommend PremiumBeat for commercial projects. They offer over 20,000 tracks from many composers. They provide a huge variety of styles, multiple payment methods, subscriptions and several affordable license options - click here to listen to PremiumBeat music
